title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Design and implement scalable backend systems using Python and cloud services. Experience with PostgreSQL required.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and deploy ML models for text understanding and recommendation systems. Familiarity with transformers and model serving.

title: Data Scientist
description: Apply NLP techniques to extract signal from resumes and job descriptions. Knowledge of embeddings and evaluation methods.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build responsive web applications using FastAPI and React. Strong Python and JavaScript skills required.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage containerized infrastructure using Docker and Kubernetes. PostgreSQL and Linux system administration experience.
